title: SPYBOX — Identity Capture | CAPXEL | CAPXEL
content: CAPXEL — AI-Native Consumer IntelligenceSee Who's Looking — Before They LeaveIdentify up to 75% of anonymous web traffic. Full identity enrichment. No opt-in required.Get StartedExplore INSPEXThe iceberg is real: most signal is hidden beneath the surface.How It WorksA Tiny Script. A Massive Lift in Visibility.SPYBOX sits quietly on your site. In under a second, it resolves a visitor’s identity and enriches them with deep consumer intelligence — so your team can activate what used to disappear.01InstallAdd a lightweight script to your site — deployed in minutes.02Identify + EnrichResolve identities in < 1 second and enrich automatically with 500+ fields.03ActivateSend profiles into your approved workflows: ads, email, analytics, or downstream CAPXEL products.FeaturesBuilt for teams who want certainty — not anonymous guesswork.Identity Capture (up to 75%)Identify a majority of anonymous traffic — turning “unknown visitors” into actionable people-level profiles.< 1 Second ResolutionFast identity resolution designed for real-time experiences and immediate downstream activation.500+ Enrichment FieldsEvery match is enriched automatically with deep consumer attributes — contact, demographics, and behavioral signals.Cross-PlatformDesigned to work with INSPEX, PROSPEX, and Buyer Ambition — capture → analyze → scale → target.Use CasesSPYBOX is the front door: it captures the signal so your team can act.E-commerce RetargetingRecover abandoned sessions by building audiences from real identities — not cookies.Ad Audience BuildingPush high-quality audiences into Meta, Google, or programmatic workflows with precision attributes.Drip Campaigns & LifecycleTrigger onboarding, winback, and nurture flows using verified identity enrichment.White-Glove Identity CaptureTurn Anonymous Traffic Into Named OpportunityWe implement SPYBOX with your governance in mind — then help your team activate the data across the stack.Get StartedExplore PROSPEXRelated: INSPEX · Buyer Ambition DataFAQCommon questions about SPYBOX.What is SPYBOX?How does SPYBOX work?What data is included in enrichment?Is SPYBOX compliant?What should I pair SPYBOX with?
summary: CAPXEL — AI-Native Consumer IntelligenceSee Who's Looking — Before They LeaveIdentify up to 75% of anonymous web traffic. Full identity enrichment.
